title: EcoCraft [SERVER-SIDE VERSION]
description: A lightweight, server-focused version of EcoCraft designed for dedicated hosts.
body:
## 🌿 MineWorks: EcoCraft - Server Edition

*A lightweight, server-focused version of EcoCraft designed for dedicated hosts.*

---

📌 **Note:** This pack is **not intended for singleplayer use** - it’s a **server-only version** of EcoCraft. Players should install either the **[EcoCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ecocraft-full)** or **[EcoCraft LITE](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ecocraft-lite)** client packs to connect.

---

**MineWorks: EcoCraft - Server Edition** contains only the **essential gameplay and backend mods** required to run an EcoCraft server. All **client-side mods** (graphics, shaders, sounds, UI polish, and visual details) have been removed to ensure:

* ⚡ **Lower resource usage**
* 🖥️ **Faster server setup**
* 🔧 **Simpler management and stability**

This makes it the **ideal base** for hosting a dedicated server for either the **Full EcoCraft** or **EcoCraft Lite** clients.

---

### 🔑 What’s Included

* ✅ All **core gameplay mods**: Origins, RPG Series, LevelZ, JobsAddon
* ✅ Worldgen & structure mods: Terralith, Tectonic, Better Nether, Better End, YUNG’s Structures
* ✅ Progression & mechanics: Serene Seasons, Early-Stage, TLOTD, Archaeology, Fishing Mini-game
* ✅ Automation & logistics: Create, Tom’s Simple Storage
* ✅ Multiplayer tools: Simple Voice Chat backend, PartyAddon
* ✅ Optimization & server stability mods

---

### ❌ What’s Removed

* 🚫 Shaders & visual enhancements
* 🚫 Ambient sound & reverb mods
* 🚫 Cosmetic/immersion-only UI & detail tweaks

These aren’t required for gameplay and only consume CPU/RAM on servers.

---

### 🌍 100% Compatible

* Works seamlessly with **EcoCraft Full** and **EcoCraft Lite** clients.
* Players can connect without any issues — all client features remain intact.
* Server admins save resources, while players still enjoy the full experience.

---

### 🗺️ 🧭 RECOMMENDED GAME START SETTINGS

For the best multiplayer experience and early gameplay balance, I recommend modifying Minecraft’s **world border behaviour**:

#### 1️⃣ Set a starting spawn barrier

* Open your world with OP on server).
* Use the command:

  ```
  /worldborder set 250
  /worldborder center ~ ~
  ```

  → This will create a **250-block radius** barrier around spawn.

#### 2️⃣ Configure **Diamond World Border**

* Start the server with the mods
* Open server's files
* Search for **config**
* Click **diamond_worldborder.json**
* Change the setting to:

  ```
  "widthPerDiamond": 50.0,
  ```
  *(This means the border will expand 50 blocks in radius for every diamond dropped at it! You may increase as you wish, 50 is just a recommendation)*

  → This ensures your party must **progress through mining and teamwork** to expand their world safely.

* Restart the server!

---

### 🗺️ Recommended Setup

* 🖥️ Host on a dedicated machine with at least **6–8 GB RAM** (10 GB+ for larger player counts).
* ⚙️ Use **Diamond World Border** settings for controlled world expansion.
* 🔧 Adjust configs as needed for party size and progression pacing.

---

### 🔧 Ideal For

* Server admins who want a **minimal, efficient server pack**
* Communities planning long-term **EcoCraft worlds**
